name: uniframe-starter
description: Tek cati altinda API, web, desktop, mobile, React, Vue ve vanilla TypeScript destekli framework workspace'i.

scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && tsx packages/cli/src/uniframe.ts dev
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:packages && tsx packages/cli/src/uniframe.ts dev web
scripts.dev:web:react: npm run build:packages && tsx packages/cli/src/uniframe.ts dev web --flavor react
scripts.dev:web:vue: npm run build:packages && tsx packages/cli/src/uniframe.ts dev web --flavor vue
scripts.dev:web:vanilla: npm run build:packages && tsx packages/cli/src/uniframe.ts dev web --flavor vanilla
scripts.dev:mobile: npm run build:packages && tsx packages/cli/src/uniframe.ts dev mobile
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build:packages && tsx packages/cli/src/uniframe.ts dev desktop
scripts.dev:example: npm run build:packages && npm --workspace examples/hello-uniframe run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && tsx packages/cli/src/uniframe.ts build
scripts.build:packages: npm --workspace @uniframe/core run build && npm --workspace @uniframe/adapters run build && npm --workspace @uniframe/vite run build
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run build:example
